source: МОН (Министерство на образованието и науката) via data.egov.bg
indexName: Per-school НВО (7th grade) + ДЗИ (12th grade) average scores
note: Pending ingest. See scripts/schools/README.md for the planned scrape design. Each obshtina entry is an array of { id, name, address, scoresByYear: { 2024: { nvo_bel, nvo_math, dzi_bel, dzi_math } } }.
